description_long: This is a modern upholstered bed with a tall, tufted headboard and a low, solid frame in a muted taupe color. The bed is neatly made with a white sheet set accented by two green-striped bands and matching pillows featuring a botanical print. On either side of the bed are two matching square nightstands, seamlessly integrated with the bed's design. The headboard is padded and features a subtle button-tufted pattern, adding a touch of elegance and comfort. The mattress is thick and visibly plush, providing ample support for sleeping. The overall design is contemporary and cohesive, suitable for a stylish urban bedroom.
description: A modern taupe upholstered bed with a tufted headboard, white and green bedding, and matching side nightstands.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the tall, plain back of the headboard and the two square nightstands flanking the bed.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the mattress, the tufted headboard, and the bedding arrangement.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full bedding set, two pillows, and the symmetrical placement of the nightstands.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the mattress, bedding, and the right nightstand, mirroring the left side.
